---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability you'd like — but please check the plan first.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What

A one-paragraph description of the feature.

## Why

What problem does it solve? What's the cost today?

## How (optional)

If you have an idea of how to implement it, sketch it. Otherwise leave blank.

## Phase

Which roadmap phase does this fit? (Phase 1 Reading MVP, Phase 2 parser, Phase 3 listening, Phase 4 future.)

## Acceptance

What would "done" look like? (e.g. "a new flag `--skip-publish` that...")
